descAccurate: Directly accesses hardware to bypass OS caches for true I/O metrics.
descAdaptive: Intelligently adjusts tests based on your system's capabilities.
descBeginner: No installation or complex arguments. Just run one command and see the results.
descPortable: A single binary with no external dependencies required.
description_suffix: . Calyx runs right in your terminal to instantly check server specs, RAM usage, disk speed, and real internet speed.
